name: NyxQueen 4Wave Diode Laser (Snow White)
shortDescription: The NyxQueen diode laser in snow white finish. 600W power, 4 wavelengths, 50 million shot lifespan. The same cutting-edge technology with a clean white elegant appearance.
description: The NyxQueen diode laser snow white edition – the same professional-grade 600W power and 4-wavelength system in a snow white finish. A perfect choice for those looking for a device that matches a clean, bright salon design.
metaTitle: NyxQueen Diode Laser Snow White | 600W, 4 wavelengths, 50M shots
metaDescription: NyxQueen 600W diode laser in snow white finish. 4 wavelengths (755, 808, 940, 1064 nm), 50M shots, advanced cooling. 2-year warranty, free training.
